title: Oil monthly drop gas prices fall — NBC News on worst monthly decline since 2020
snippet: NBC News reports on the worst monthly oil price decline since March 2020, with Brent down 19% in May. Ties decline to Iran ceasefire expectations and anticipated Hormuz reopening. Notes downstream impact on US domestic gasoline prices.
tag_reason: NBC News coverage of same oil price decline story; adds US domestic gas price impact angle
